productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men ZX 8000 Tan Casual Shoes
description: For those who prefer muted colour leather sneakers, the ZX 800 from adidas originals makes for a great buy. Packed with features and the trademark ZX moulded heel, this shoe is a perfect blend of style and comfort.This shoe comes with an extra pair of laces.UpperLeather upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes and strategically placed overlays for enhanced shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue for optimum fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded midsole with  ZX moulded heel detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs for absolute durability, grip and tractionPivot point on the big toe mound for ease 180 degree movement of the footTorsion system on the midfoot for better midfoot protectionSuction groove on the heel for better backfoot cushioningShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner if necessaryDo not store in direct sunlight
